title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India Digital Technologies - Apply Now
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
